name: automated-apps
description: High-tech professional application for building code-only projects with automatic language detection and dependency resolution
author: SwbTech

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:prod: npm run build && npm run package
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.clean: rimraf dist build node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules
